# compositionRenderer()

**Instance Method**

Returns the renderer object associated with the composition parameter view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func compositionRenderer() -> (any QCCompositionRenderer)!
```

## Return Value

A renderer object or `nil`, if the composition parameter view is not set to a renderer object.

## Getting and Setting the Renderer

- **setCompositionRenderer(_:)**: Sets the composition parameter view for editing the input parameters of the provided renderer object.
